name: Bell Financial Group Limited
analysis: BFG has all Fibonacci EMAs in full bullish alignment. Price making higher highs and higher lows — healthy uptrend structure. Price has pulled back and is testing the 21 EMA at A$1.3995. This is a core Fibonacci pullback to a key trend EMA. Strong confluence zone at A$1.4066 where 3 levels cluster. Trade setup: entry A$1.3995, stop A$1.3316, target A$1.4300. Risk/reward is 0.45:1. Weekly EMAs are bullish.
